message:
test(proptest): add 25 property tests for robot_types coverage gaps

Add RT-42 through RT-66 covering mission enums (MissionRunState,
MissionAgentState, MissionActionState), transaction enums and types
(TxStepRisk, TxPhaseState, TxPreconditionKind, TxCompensationKind,
TxStepOutcome, TxResumeRecommendation, TxBundleClassification),
search types (SearchStreamPhase, SearchScoringBreakdown,
SearchPipelineTiming, SearchData), and workflow/mission data types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
